ops.body: 2026-07-19 ~06:30Z: OBSERVABILITY IS LIVE IN PRODUCTION — the re-fit collection window starts now. cc-steer v0.17.0 released (tag on 68a94f3958ca; CI 4/4 green, release-pypi green, cold-cache uvx smoke passed after the usual index-propagation wait) carrying the scored-moments telemetry: every gate-scored turn upserts a durable row (session, turn, project, gate score/threshold/passed, stage-2 prob/threshold — gate-passed rows recorded BEFORE stage 2 so stage-2 failures stay visible; WAL + busy_timeout aligned with the mailbox so turn-cadence writes can't crash the daemon; byte-exact legacy gate predicate preserved incl. NaN behavior). All three launchd agents reinstalled pinned ==0.17.0; com.cc-steer.watch kickstarted, healthy banner (v002 drafter abstain 0.0001, v002 gate 0.9985, mirror mode), scored_moments table present in shadow.db. The shadow report now carries a 30-day-windowed scores block (deciles, pass rate, freshness heartbeat) — the exact distribution the threshold re-fit consumes. NEXT for this task: let the window accrue under real traffic, then design + run the re-fit (both budget thresholds recomputed so the gate actually fires ~2/100 live), re-promote, THEN the allow_projects/live_allow decision. The Sunday 04:00 weekly retrain lane also now runs 0.17.0 (no gate changes vs 0.16.0).
